schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
A sanitation scheme for the construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) for urban households. The Mission has the following components:

   1. Household toilets, including conversion of insanitary latrines into pour-flush latrines.
   1. Community toilets
   1. Public toilets
   1. Solid waste management
   1. IEC &amp; Public Awareness
   1. Capacity building and Administrative &amp; Office Expenses (A&amp;OE)
schemeContent.benefits_md: A Financial support of minimum 1. Rs - 6667 (in Andhra Pradesh ,Bihar, Chhattisgarh ,Goa, Gujarat, Haryana, Jharkhand, Karnataka ,Kerala, Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra ,Odisha, Punjab, Rajasthan, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal), 1. Rs - 12,000 (in Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Sikkim, Tripura, Assam) 1. Rs - 5333 (in Union Territories) is provided for Toilet Construction
schemeContent.briefDescription: A sanitation scheme for the construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) for urban households.

children.text: A sanitation scheme for the construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) for urban households. The Mission has the following components:
Household toilets, including conversion of insanitary latrines into pour-flush latrines.
Community toilets
Public toilets
Solid waste management
IEC & Public Awareness
Capacity building and Administrative & Office Expenses (A&OE)
A Financial support of minimum

Rs - 6667 (in Andhra Pradesh ,Bihar, Chhattisgarh ,Goa, Gujarat, Haryana, Jharkhand, Karnataka ,Kerala, Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra ,Odisha, Punjab, Rajasthan, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal),
Rs - 12,000 (in Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Sikkim, Tripura, Assam)
Rs - 5333 (in Union Territories) is provided for Toilet Construction
Applicant creates an Applicant Login ID by registering on IHHL using Name , Mobile Number ,  Email , Address , ID Type, ID Number.
After successful login the applicant enters the following details
In Geographical Particulars (State, District, ULB Name, Ward No.)

Toilet Owner’s Particulars (Name*, Gender*, Father/ Husband’s Name*, Mobile No*, Residential Address*, Status of Existing Toilet, Aadhar Linked Transfer of Incentive, Aadhar Number, Bank Account Detail*, Photograph*)
After successful submission of Application, An IHHL Application Acknowledgement slip is generated with Application ID and Bank Account Detail

applicationProcess.process_md:
1. Applicant creates an Applicant Login ID by registering on IHHL using Name , Mobile Number ,  Email , Address , ID Type, ID Number.
1. After successful login the applicant enters the following details


- In Geographical Particulars (State, District, ULB Name, Ward No.)
- Toilet Owner’s Particulars (Name*, Gender*, Father/ Husband’s Name*, Mobile No*, Residential Address*, Status of Existing Toilet, Aadhar Linked Transfer of Incentive, Aadhar Number, Bank Account Detail*, Photograph*)


1.  After successful submission of Application, An IHHL Application Acknowledgement slip is generated with Application ID and Bank Account Detail

schemeDefinitions.name: Insanitary toilet

children.text: Discharging directly to drains or other water-body
All households with single-pit latrines

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md:
1. Discharging directly to drains or other water-body 
1. All households with single-pit latrines

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: Any household that does not have access to an individual household toilet ( **80% of urban households engaging in open defecation**) or has an insanitary toilet.

children.text: Any household that does not have access to an individual household toilet (
80% of urban households engaging in open defecation
) or has an insanitary toilet.
